positive: A minimalist abstract jungle silhouette, featuring stylized tropical foliage like banana leaves, monstera, and heliconia. The composition should be centered and symmetric, designed for a circular print. Use a limited, deep color palette of emerald green, teal, sapphire blue, and pops of burnt orange against a pristine white background. The style must be clean vector illustration mixed with ink wash elements, emphasizing high contrast and crisp lines for extreme print clarity. The arrangement should feel dynamic yet balanced, suggesting growth and tranquility. Highly detailed linework, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, fuzzy, low resolution, artifact, text, watermark, logo, letter, copyright, poor anatomy, distorted, bad composition, muted colors, grayscale, photorealism, messy, complex background
